title: Comparative metagenomic analysis using VIROME
author: Jaysheel Bhavsar
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.d7j9km

steps.title: Access VIROME Application
steps.instruction: Go to VIROME web application.

steps.title: Click Login
steps.instruction: Click the login button.

steps.title: Authenticate
steps.instruction: Enter username and password to authenticate into the application.

steps.title: Initiate Comparison
steps.instruction: Click the compare button.

steps.title: View Libraries
steps.instruction: The VIROME Comparinator will appear with a list of both private and public libraries.

steps.title: Filter Libraries
steps.instruction: Using the dialogue box below the list you can filter the libraries based on a search term.

steps.title: Select Libraries
steps.instruction: Double click on library names to choose them for analysis. They will appear in the window panel to the right of the list.

steps.title: Choose Metrics
steps.instruction: Choose desired metric(s) for library comparison. Taxonomy, function, and environment options can be selected.

steps.title: Select Output Format
steps.instruction: Choose the output format(s). Tab delimited file and Biological Observation Matrix format for QIME analysis options can be selected.

steps.title: Submit Analysis
steps.instruction: Click "Submit".

steps.title: Download Data
steps.instruction: Click "OK" to download data.

steps.title: Save File
steps.instruction: Once prompted to save the file, do not change the file name!

steps.title: Open Finder
steps.instruction: Navigate to the Finder.

steps.title: Unzip File
steps.instruction: Double click to unzip the file.

steps.title: Verify Files
steps.instruction: One file for each metric selected should appear.

steps.title: Open in Excel
steps.instruction: Tab delimited files can be opened in Excel spreadsheet.

steps.title: Import Text File
steps.instruction: Import as text file.

steps.title: Enable All File Types
steps.instruction: Enable "All file" types.

steps.title: Get Data
steps.instruction: Click "Get Data".

steps.title: Proceed to Next Step
steps.instruction: Click "Next".
